system: You are a helpful voice assistant. Keep replies concise and conversational, suitable for being spoken aloud. Two or three sentences at most.
notes: Each turn is one user utterance in a single multi-turn conversation.
`text` is the ground-truth transcript, used both to synthesize the input
audio fixture (when no real recording is supplied) and to score STT WER.
`expect_any` is a soft topical check: at least one phrase should appear in
the assistant reply. It is NOT a factual-correctness gate (the model has no
live tools); it just flags a reply that wandered completely off topic.

turns.text: Hello, what is the weather today?
Can you make me a hotel trip plan to the Great Barrier Reef? I'm in New York now.
How about the weather, would that cause issues?
